title: Add cluster report threshold trigger (Golden Test 13)

evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 13: cluster report triggers when threshold is met.
acceptance_criteria: Deterministic cluster report generation when golden thresholds are met without Ollama.
Report JSON includes concepts, supporting/contradicting claims, relationships, gaps, and next questions.
non_goals: Do not implement LangGraph or live web discovery.
